data.title: Home Bancshares Chairman Tracy M. French to Retire
data.description:
An announcement from Home Bancshares ( (HOMB) ) is now available.

On February 27, 2025, Tracy M. French announced his decision to retire from his roles as a director of Home BancShares and Chairman of the Board of Centennial Bank, effective April 17, 2025. He will transition to an advisory role for two years, maintaining his salary but foregoing bonuses and change in control benefits, while adhering to non-compete and confidentiality agreements.

More about Home Bancshares

Home BancShares, Inc. operates in the financial services industry, primarily offering banking services through its subsidiary, Centennial Bank. The company focuses on providing a range of financial products and services to its customers.

YTD Price Performance: 4.37%

Average Trading Volume: 1,010,285

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $5.84B

data.title: Tetra Tech Holds Annual Stockholders Meeting 2025
data.description:
Tetra Tech ( (TTEK) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On February 27, 2025, Tetra Tech held its annual meeting of stockholders to address several key issues. The meeting included the election of six board members, approval of executive compensation, and ratification of PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP as the independent accounting firm for fiscal 2025. The outcomes of these votes are significant for the company’s governance and financial oversight, impacting its strategic direction and stakeholder confidence.

More about Tetra Tech

data.description:
Biomea Fusion ( (BMEA) ) just unveiled an announcement.

data.title: BridgeBio Pharma Strengthens Financial Position with Note Issuance
data.description:
BridgeBio Pharma ( (BBIO) ) has issued an update.

On February 28, 2025, BridgeBio Pharma issued $575 million in 1.75% Convertible Senior Notes due 2031 in a private offering to qualified institutional buyers. The proceeds, approximately $563 million after expenses, were used to repay outstanding borrowings under a financing agreement and to repurchase shares of its common stock, with the remaining funds allocated for general corporate purposes. This strategic financial move aims to strengthen BridgeBio’s balance sheet, reduce interest expenses, and provide greater operational flexibility, potentially impacting the company’s market position and stock price.

More about BridgeBio Pharma

BridgeBio Pharma is a biopharmaceutical company focused on discovering, creating, testing, and delivering transformative medicines for genetic diseases. Founded in 2015, the company has a pipeline that spans from early science to advanced clinical trials.

Average Trading Volume: 2,640,453

data.title: IAC/InteractiveCorp’s Dotdash Meredith Releases Financial Statements
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from IAC/InteractiveCorp. ( (IAC) ).

Dotdash Meredith Inc., a subsidiary of IAC/InteractiveCorp, has released its consolidated financial statements for the years ending December 31, 2024, and 2023. The independent audit conducted by Ernst & Young LLP concluded that the financial statements present a fair view of the company’s financial position, adhering to U.S. accounting standards. The audit report highlights the company’s ability to continue as a going concern and notes the management’s responsibility for financial statement preparation and internal controls.

More about IAC/InteractiveCorp.

data.title: Quisitive Shareholders Approve Acquisition by H.I.G. Capital
data.description:
Quisitive Technology Solutions ( (TSE:QUIS) ) has provided an update.

Quisitive Technology Solutions Inc. announced that its shareholders have approved the acquisition by an affiliate of H.I.G. Capital, LLC, with an overwhelming majority vote. This acquisition, structured under a plan of arrangement, will provide shareholders with cash consideration for their shares and is expected to close in March 2025, pending final court approval and satisfaction of customary closing conditions. The acquisition is anticipated to enhance Quisitive’s operational capabilities and market positioning, potentially benefiting stakeholders through expanded resources and strategic growth opportunities.

More about Quisitive Technology Solutions

Quisitive Technology Solutions Inc. is a leading global Microsoft partner specializing in cloud and AI solutions. The company focuses on helping enterprises across various industries leverage the Microsoft platform to innovate and thrive in the era of artificial intelligence.

data.title: Pinnacle Financial Partners Approves 2025 Cash Incentive Plan
data.description:
Pinnacle Financial Partners ( (PNFP) ) just unveiled an update.

On February 25, 2025, Pinnacle Financial Partners’ Board of Directors approved the 2025 Annual Cash Incentive Plan, which allows employees to earn cash incentives based on performance metrics such as earnings per share and total revenue goals. The plan, which applies to all salaried and hourly employees, offers payouts ranging from 10% to 125% of base salaries, with adjustments possible based on individual performance evaluations and the discretion of the committee.

More about Pinnacle Financial Partners

Pinnacle Financial Partners operates in the financial services industry, providing banking and financial solutions primarily through its subsidiary, Pinnacle Bank. The company focuses on offering a range of services including personal and business banking, investment management, and financial advisory services.

data.title: Velocity Minerals to Divest Bulgarian Assets in $55 Million Deal
data.description:
Velocity Minerals ( (TSE:VLC) ) has issued an update.

Velocity Minerals Ltd. has entered into a definitive agreement to sell its 70% interest in the Rozino project and grant an option to Türker Mining to acquire other Bulgarian mineral assets. The transaction, valued at USD $55 million, is structured in two tranches, with the first payment contingent on shareholder approval. This deal positions Türker Mining to advance the Rozino project towards production, potentially benefiting the local economy in southeast Bulgaria.

More about Velocity Minerals

Velocity Minerals Ltd. is a company operating in the mining industry, primarily focused on mineral exploration and development. The company is involved in projects that aim to bring economic benefits to local regions through its operations.

YTD Price Performance: -1.82%

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

data.title: Healthcare Realty Trust Updates on Rent Collection Challenges
data.description:
Healthcare Realty Trust ( (HR) ) has shared an update.

On February 28, 2025, Healthcare Realty Trust announced its participation in Citi’s 2025 Global Property CEO Conference scheduled for March 3-4, 2025, and released an updated investor presentation. Additionally, the company reported partial rent collection from Prospect Medical, which filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy in January 2025. Healthcare Realty collected $0.4 million in rent for January and February 2025, but there is uncertainty regarding the recovery of additional unpaid rent or the ability to relet the space.

More about Healthcare Realty Trust

Healthcare Realty Trust is a real estate investment trust (REIT) specializing in owning and operating medical outpatient buildings, primarily located around market-leading hospital campuses. The company focuses on portfolio growth through property acquisition and development, with over 650 properties totaling 38.4 million square feet in 15 growth markets.

data.title: Surge Copper Corp. Grants Equity Incentives and Finalizes Property Agreement
data.description:
Surge Copper Corp ( (TSE:SURG) ) has shared an update.

Surge Copper Corp. has announced the grant of equity-based incentive awards, distributing restricted share units to employees and executives, and deferred share units to non-executive directors. Additionally, the company has completed the MacLean East Property agreement, receiving approval from the TSX Venture Exchange, with a cap on the maximum number of shares issuable under the agreement.

More about Surge Copper Corp

Surge Copper Corp. is a Canadian company focused on advancing an emerging critical metals district in British Columbia. It owns a large mineral claim package with advanced porphyry deposits containing copper, molybdenum, gold, and silver, which are essential for modern energy infrastructure and electrification technologies.
